content_body: Gary, Lissa, Taylor, and Travis - We can’t even express how grateful we are to God that we have made lifelong friends with your beautiful family. Your company has enriched our time here more than we could have imagined. Your gift of hospitality was well received, and the conversations and laughter we will just cherish! Taylor, we sure will miss you and your beautiful smile and heart. Thank you for playing the piano for us – you are SO talented! Travis – God gave you the most amazing personality. We enjoyed your fire for life and how much of a little gentleman you are! I know “Other-Taylor_ and Jacob will miss you a lot! I’m so glad I have so many pictures to remember this week by, even thought my family has dubbed me the “Jillerazzi”. We have a memory for a lifetime and are so honored to call you our friends. Thank you for everything. In Christ’s Love.
title: Memories in Blue Ridge Etched in the Soul Forever
